_primary_source: Primary source: (Feinberg, 1982) DOI 10.1364/OL.7.000486 (self-pumped phase conjugator using internal reflection); (Cronin-Golomb et al., 1984) DOI 10.1109/JQE.1984.1072018; (Zel'dovich, 1985) ISBN 978-3-540-13458-4. Self-pumped four-wave-mixing phase conjugation.
title: QA_SELF_PUMPED_CONJUGATE_CERT.v1
description: Fixture schema for QA Self-Pumped Phase Conjugate Cert [523]: the internal-reflection ('cat') conjugator with no external pump, realized in the QA additive group on {1,...,m}.

signal_state.description: clean signal phase state s in {1,...,m}

self_pump.description: internally self-generated loop pump p (output must be independent of it)

phase_screen.description: forward distorting medium phi (per-site modular shift)

return_screen.description: return medium phi'; equals phase_screen for same-medium recovery

expected_conjugate.description: claimed self-pumped output = fwm(p, qa_neg(p), s) = qa_neg(s), pump-independent

expected_recovered.description: claimed self-referenced distortion-correction output = qa_mod(-s + return_screen - phase_screen)
